initiatives.name: What's Up?! Pittsburgh
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through anti-racist organizing in Pittsburgh. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for racial justice education and movement building.

initiatives.name: Thomas Merton Center
initiatives.description: A resource center committed to peace and social justice through nonviolent struggle and mutual aid. The center provides organizing space, education programs, and support for grassroots movements working toward systemic change in Pittsburgh.

initiatives.name:
Steel City Organizing Radical Community Health
              (SCORCH)
initiatives.description: Community based, all volunteer collective of healthcare activists and street medics.

initiatives.name: Let's Get Free
initiatives.description: The Women and Trans Prisoner Defense Committee

initiatives.name: 412 Food Rescue
initiatives.description: Preventing food waste by redirecting surplus food to those experiencing food insecurity

initiatives.name: The Big Idea
initiatives.description: A volunteer-run radical bookstore and community space providing access to literature, zines, and organizing resources while fostering mutual aid and solidarity through events and community initiatives.

initiatives.name: Death Drive Press
initiatives.description: Anti-profit collective independent press specializing in limited-run hand-made chapbooks and radical literature

initiatives.name: The Big Idea Bookstore and Cafe
initiatives.description: Anarchist bookstore that hosts events and sells radical literature.

initiatives.name:
Black Liberation Autonomous
              Collective
              (BLAC)
initiatives.description: Organization focused on Black liberation and TGNCNB mutual aid support in Pittsburgh.

initiatives.name: Sisters PGH
initiatives.description: A Black and trans-led mutual aid organization providing direct support and advocacy for the LGBTQ+ community in Pittsburgh. They coordinate housing assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through trans leadership development and creating spaces for community care.

initiatives.name: Black Anarchist Community Council (BACC)
initiatives.description: Black-led mutual aid and community support organization.

initiatives.name: Pittsburgh Cares
initiatives.description: Connecting volunteers with community service opportunities and mutual aid initiatives.

initiatives.name: Steel City Mutual Aid Society
initiatives.description: Community-based mutual aid network providing direct support

initiatives.name: Steel City Anti-Fascist League
initiatives.description: Anti-Fascist Action | Anti-Police Action | Anti-Imperial Action | Straight Edge

initiatives.name: FILLER Pittsburgh
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing community support and solidarity initiatives in Pittsburgh. They coordinate resource sharing, direct support, and community organizing while building networks of care and resistance through various social movements.

initiatives.name: Women in Prison
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective providing support and resources to incarcerated women in Pittsburgh and surrounding areas. They coordinate letter writing, commissary support, reentry assistance, and advocacy initiatives while building networks of care and solidarity with incarcerated community members.

initiatives.name: Bukit Bail Fund
initiatives.description: A coalition of individuals supporting those incarcerated in Allegheny County Jail.
